response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java, Kotlin, Spring, or JVM tooling despite the role's core requirements; their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps with no evidence of enterprise IDE development, build tool integration, or JVM internals expertise.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling initiatives
Proven ability to lead and teach through workshops and community projects
concerns: No visible Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience in resume
Lacks demonstrated work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM tooling
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) misaligned with JVM-focused role
